_meta.source: Decision No. 1894/QD-TTg, September 4, 2025 — Prime Minister's Decision
_meta.signed_by: Deputy Prime Minister Tran Hong Ha
_meta.linked_decision: Decision 980/QD-TTg (Aug 22, 2023) — Specific Catalogue of Environmental Industry Technologies, Equipment & Products

program_identity.official_name_vi: Chương trình phát triển ngành công nghiệp môi trường Việt Nam giai đoạn 2025–2030
program_identity.official_name_en: Program for the Development of Vietnam's Environmental Industry Sector for the 2025–2030 Period
program_identity.nature: National Industrial Development Program — NOT a waste infrastructure construction plan. This is a TECHNOLOGY INDUSTRY BUILD-UP program focused on domestic production capability, R&D, market formation, and enterprise development in the environmental technology sector.
program_identity.distinction_from_waste_masterplans: Unlike VN-WW-2030 (wastewater treatment infrastructure) or VN-ENV solid waste plans, D1894 focuses on BUILDING THE INDUSTRY THAT MAKES the equipment/technology — i.e., developing Vietnamese-made environmental technology products and services.

core_philosophy: Develop Environmental Industry (CNMT) as an independent economic sector contributing to national GDP
Private sector is the central force — strong support via green credit, tech access, market development
Innovation, digital transformation, and modern technology as growth drivers
Strategic self-reliance: domestic production to reduce import dependency on environmental technology
Export ambition: Vietnam to export environmental technology/equipment where it gains competitive advantage

wastewater_treatment_tech.target: 70–80% of domestic demand met by Vietnamese-made technology & equipment
wastewater_treatment_tech.scope: Technology, equipment, and industrial products for wastewater treatment

exhaust_gas_treatment_tech.target: 60–70% of domestic demand met by Vietnamese-made technology & equipment
exhaust_gas_treatment_tech.scope: Air pollution control technology and equipment

solid_hazardous_waste_tech.scope: Collection vehicles, sorting equipment, recycling machinery, hazardous waste treatment systems

environmental_monitoring_equipment.target: 20% of domestic demand met by Vietnamese-made monitoring devices
environmental_monitoring_equipment.scope: Sensors, IoT monitoring systems, air/water quality analyzers

waste_to_energy_tech.target: Develop technology & products for energy production from waste
waste_to_energy_tech.scope: WTE boilers, biogas systems, landfill gas recovery

policy_framework.target: Government Decree specifically regulating environmental industry development
policy_framework.recycling_industrial_parks: Legal framework to form and develop recycling industrial parks and clusters
policy_framework.hs_codes: Issue HS codes for environmental goods in harmonized tariff schedule

enterprise_development.target: Form large-scale private environmental technology corporations
enterprise_development.state_enterprise_role: PETROVIETNAM, VINACHEM, VINACOMIN, VEAM, VINAINCON to develop environmental industry subsidiaries

national_kpi_2030.foreign_investment: Attract FDI into environmental industry; progress toward export of advantageous environmental technologies

Task_1_Policy_Institutional.title: Completing Policy & Institutional Framework
sub_tasks: Review and update legal framework for environmental industry development
Develop and publish standards/technical regulations for environmental industry goods
Amend tax policy to favor environmental goods and promote technology transfer
Add environmental industry statistics to national statistical system
Issue HS codes for environmental goods in harmonized tariff schedule
Enact incentive policies for recycling industrial parks and clusters
Support enterprises receiving technology transfer, purchasing patents/software
Review catalogue of specific technologies (Decision 980/QD-TTg): WTE, wastewater treatment, recycled construction materials, RE waste recycling, monitoring systems, biodegradable plastics
Draft Government Decree on environmental industry development

Task_2_Market_Development.title: Developing Environmental Industry Goods Market
sub_tasks: Stimulate market demand through government procurement orders and direct contracting for domestic enterprises
Develop supply capacity of environmental technology enterprises
Support SMEs + establish environmental industry incubator network in industrial parks, hi-tech zones, and training institutions
Eco-labeling for environmental industry products
Trade promotion and investment attraction activities
Develop environmental industry enterprises under state conglomerates (PETROVIETNAM, VINACHEM, VINACOMIN, VEAM, VINAINCON)
Promote public-private partnerships in R&D and production
Establish National Environmental Industry Centers (national-level production, tech transfer, innovation hubs)

Task_3_RnD_Innovation_Digital.title: R&D, Innovation & Digital Transformation
sub_tasks: Master and develop technologies in the Decision 980 catalogue: WTE, wastewater treatment, recycling, biodegradable plastics, green materials
Disseminate advanced production processes and pollution reduction technologies
Research, prototype, and transfer advanced environmental technologies
Support enterprises receiving technology transfer, purchasing patents/software, hiring experts
International cooperation in training, research, and technology transfer
RE waste treatment technology (solar panel recycling, wind turbine blade recycling)
Apply CAD/CAM in equipment manufacturing
Develop mechatronic equipment and automated control systems for environmental industry
Biosensor products for environmental monitoring
Support adoption of sustainable business models, energy efficiency, circular economy

Task_4_Human_Resources.title: Training & Human Resource Development
sub_tasks: Build database on human resource needs and quality for environmental industry
Develop training programs and courses for state managers, enterprise managers, and technical workers
Design HR development curriculum for environmental industry

Task_5_Digital_Platform.title: Environmental Industry Information Portal
sub_tasks: Build and update enterprise database of environmental industry goods
Develop web portal for information storage, retrieval, and updates on environmental industry
Invest in maintaining and upgrading portal infrastructure
Annual data updates on environmental industry development

Task_6_Communications.title: Communications & Awareness
sub_tasks: Public communication campaigns on environmental industry via mass media
Competitions and awareness programs on environmental industry
International information exchange and best practice sharing
Awards and recognition for contributions to environmental industry development
Support enterprises participating in Vietnam National Brand program

wastewater_treatment_industry.description: Manufacturing of wastewater treatment equipment, systems, and chemicals
wastewater_treatment_industry.target_2030: Meet 70–80% of domestic market + export capability
wastewater_treatment_industry.current_gaps: High import dependency from Korea, Japan, EU for advanced treatment systems

exhaust_gas_treatment_industry.description: Air pollution control equipment for industrial sources
exhaust_gas_treatment_industry.current_gaps: Advanced systems almost entirely imported; basic equipment locally made

solid_hazardous_waste_industry.description: Collection, sorting, recycling, and treatment equipment
solid_hazardous_waste_industry.current_gaps: Incineration and hazardous waste treatment relies heavily on imported technology

environmental_monitoring.current_gaps: Almost entirely import-dependent; some local assembly

waste_to_energy.description: Technology and equipment for energy production from waste
waste_to_energy.current_gaps: Large-scale WTE plants use imported technology (China, Europe)

recycling_industrial_parks.description: Establishment of dedicated recycling clusters as anchor institutions
recycling_industrial_parks.target_2030: Legal framework + at least pilot recycling industrial parks established
recycling_industrial_parks.concept: Eco-industrial parks where environmental technology companies co-locate for synergies
recycling_industrial_parks.current_status: No formal recycling industrial parks exist; concept in development

ministry_responsibilities.MOIT: Lead coordinator; policy framework; market development; enterprise development; national centers; annual reporting
ministry_responsibilities.MONRE: Environmental standards; monitoring network; EPR implementation; international environmental agreements
ministry_responsibilities.MOF: Budget allocation; tax policy for environmental goods; green finance framework
ministry_responsibilities.MOST: R&D funding; technology transfer; innovation programs; standards development
ministry_responsibilities.MOC: Construction standards for environmental facilities; building code integration
ministry_responsibilities.MARD: Agricultural/rural environmental technology needs; water resource protection
ministry_responsibilities.Provincial_Peoples_Committees: Implement at province level; allocate land for recycling industrial parks; support local enterprises; annual provincial progress reporting to MOIT

financing.public_budget: State budget for management/administration activities (environment protection fund, economic activities, S&T activities)
financing.private_sector: Enterprise own capital + commercial loans (primary source for investment activities)
financing.green_credit: Green credit lines from credit institutions
financing.foreign_investment: FDI attracted into environmental technology sector
financing.note: No single fixed total investment figure — program is a framework, not a capital construction project

province_role.description: Provinces implement D1894 through provincial action plans. Key provinces for environmental industry development:

Hanoi.role: National R&D hub; university-industry linkage; government procurement market
Hanoi.opportunities: National Environmental Industry Center candidate; monitoring equipment R&D; university partnerships

Ho Chi Minh City.role: Largest industrial market; private sector leadership; export gateway
Ho Chi Minh City.opportunities: Largest demand center for env. technology; WTE technology hub; recycling industrial park pilot

Binh Duong.role: Industrial park concentration; eco-industrial park development
Binh Duong.opportunities: Eco-industrial park conversion; industrial wastewater treatment tech demand

Dong Nai.role: Major industrial province; large wastewater/solid waste market
Dong Nai.opportunities: Industrial waste treatment technology demand; hazardous waste management

Hai Phong.opportunities: Industrial env. technology demand; export platform for env. equipment

Da Nang.role: Central region hub; smart city + environmental technology pilot
Da Nang.opportunities: Smart environmental monitoring pilot; SME environmental tech incubator

Can Tho.opportunities: Wastewater/solid waste technology demand; agricultural waste treatment

2025_immediate: Issue HS codes for environmental goods
2025_2026: Amend tax policies for environmental goods
Begin national environmental industry statistics compilation
Initiate recycling industrial park pilot sites
2027_2028: Draft Government Decree on environmental industry
2029_2030: Achieve KPI targets for domestic market share
